svg.title: 🧩LK Mini｜最小可逆世界核心｜LKMini
svg.desc: Mini 不是小功能，Mini 是最小可逆宇宙種子。SHA256 is identity. Locator is entry. Manifest is registry. Snapshot is time. ReverseChain is memory.

svg.text: 最小可逆世界核心｜Minimal Reversible World Core
Mini 不是小功能，Mini 是最小可逆宇宙種子。
SHA256 → Manifest → Locator → Snapshot → ReverseChain → Package
